content:
Just in advance of the Interclub finals, we held out 2018 Edmonton Squash Club Championships last weekend. It was a full house with 7 different levels this year, and the finals was a nail-biter with almost nothing to separate our winner Abdul from our runner-up Clarke in five hard-fought games.

Congratulation to all the winners from our Club Championships this past weekend.

Open/Level 1: Winner: Abdul El Nady, Runner-Up: Clarke Wiebe

Level Two: Greg MacPhail, Runner-Up: Josh Pulfer

Level Three: Joe Mann, Runner-Up: Trevor Belanger

Level Four: Winner: Ash Badry, Runner-Up: Tony McClellan

Level Five: Winner Geoff MacNeil, Runner-Up: Ian Douglas

Level Six: Winner: Mosin Zamin, Runner-Up: Raph Fortin

Thank you to Jeff, Anne, Lia and Sandra for making this such a fun and well-run event, and to Joe Mann for the photography!
